---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-workspace
key: sv0-toolchain-workspace
state: active
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - workspace
  - meta
title: "workspace: sv0-toolchain meta-repo and four subprojects"
type: task
---

# workspace: sv0-toolchain meta-repository

## purpose

**sv0-toolchain** is the parent git repository that tracks coordinated development across four submodules:

| submodule | role |
|-------------|------|
| **sv0doc** | Formal spec hub: language, bytecode, and pointers to toolchain / MCP documentation |
| **sv0c** | Bootstrap compiler (SML/NJ): lexer through C and VM backends |
| **sv0vm** | Bytecode loader and stack interpreter for `.sv0b` |
| **sv0-mcp** | Neo4j-backed MCP server and sync tooling for AI-assisted development and debugging |

this task file is the **index** for agent and human workflows: environment layout, milestone task files under `task/`, and verification that submodules are present.

## dependencies

/require: bash

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm
/env: SV0_MCP_ROOT=sv0-mcp

## submodule and layout check

/assert: test -d $SV0DOC_ROOT
/assert: test -d $SV0C_ROOT
/assert: test -d $SV0VM_ROOT
/assert: test -d $SV0_MCP_ROOT

/run: 01-verify-submodules.sh
/run: 02-verify-roadmap-artifacts.sh

## full toolchain roadmap (option C)

the design document’s **milestones 2–6**, cross-cutting backlog (macros, literate `*.sv0.md`, `std`, packaging), and **refinement protocol** live in:

- `task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd` — master index, design ↔ task mapping, dependency graph

individual milestone task files are listed in the table below; split further with new `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-*.Rmd` or `/include:` children as work stabilizes.

## milestone and area tasks (child Rmd files)

use these as entry points for scoped work:

| area | task file | submodule / scope |
|------|-----------|-------------------|
| formal language spec (extracted) | `task/sv0doc-milestone-0.Rmd` | sv0doc |
| bootstrap compiler (design M1) | `task/sv0c-milestone-1.Rmd` | sv0c |
| bytecode VM + backend (design M2 slice) | `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd` | sv0c + sv0vm |
| self-hosting **prep** — test, fmt, doc, **`lib/`** bootstrap seeds (design M2 slice) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd` | parent + sv0c + sv0vm |
| self-hosting compiler (design M3) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd` | sv0c (+ future sv0 sources) |
| advanced verification (design M4) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-4-verification.Rmd` | sv0c + sv0doc |
| LLVM + crypto (design M5) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-5-llvm-crypto.Rmd` | sv0c + sv0doc |
| kernel / bare metal (design M6) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-6-kernel.Rmd` | sv0c + sv0doc |
| cross-cutting backlog | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-cross-cutting.Rmd` | multi |
| MCP server + graph | `task/sv0-mcp-milestone-0.Rmd` | sv0-mcp |

finer-grained tasks remain as existing `task/sv0c-*.Rmd`, `task/sv0vm-*.Rmd`, `task/sv0doc-*.Rmd` files included from those milestones.

## dependency flow

```
sv0doc (spec) ─────────────────────────────┐
     │                                     │
     v                                     │
sv0c (compiler)                            │
     ├── C backend                         │
     └── VM backend ──> sv0vm (interpreter) │
                                            │
sv0-mcp (graph + MCP tools) ────────────────┘
     mirrors spec, compiler phases, VM, tasks for AI workflows
```

## aggregate commands (parent repo only)

from the **sv0-toolchain** root:

- **`make help`** — prints **`Makefile`** targets (**`make test`**, **`make test-guards`**, **`make check`**, **`make doc`**, **`ci`**, …). The **`make test`** lines summarize the full pipeline as **`./scripts/sv0 test`**; **`make test-guards`** matches **`./scripts/sv0 test-guards`** (Python-only slice). use **`make`** when you prefer it over **`scripts/sv0`** directly.
- `./scripts/sv0 check` — compile-check **sv0c** + load **sv0vm**
- `./scripts/sv0 test` — **sv0c** `make test`; Python guards (**block-comment nesting**, **sv0doc baseline**, **`verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** on **`task/*.Rmd`**, **`verify_readme_sv0c_gitlink.py`** on **README** bootstrap table); **sv0vm** bytecode tests; C + VM integration scripts; **bootstrap-build** for **`sv0c/lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**; **stage0** golden C diff when **`sv0c/lib/golden/stage0/<stem>.c`** exists; **doctests** (see **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`** completion criteria for the exact order)
- `./scripts/sv0 test-guards` — **Python only**: the same Python guards as the start of **`sv0 test`** (no **SML**), including **vm-parity manifest ⊆ `sv0c/lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**. Use after editing **`task/*.Rmd`**, **sv0doc**, **README** bootstrap table, **manifest/bootstrap** lists, or **`.sv0`** comments before running the full harness. **`make test-guards`** is the same command.
- `./scripts/sv0 test-mcp` — **sv0-mcp** unit tests (requires `uv`; skips if absent)
- `./scripts/sv0 doc` — required paths under **sv0doc** (+ **sv0-mcp** README)
- `make ci` / `./scripts/sv0 ci` — **SML-only** CI: check + test + VM integration script (does **not** run sv0-mcp)
- `make ci-all` / `./scripts/sv0 ci-all` — same as `ci`, then **sv0-mcp** tests when `uv` is available
- **Neo4j graph (sv0-mcp)** — after meaningful updates to **`task/`** milestones, **sv0doc** normative files, or compiler/VM layout docs indexed by sync, run **`cd sv0-mcp && ./scripts/sync-graph.sh all`** so MCP tools (**`get_task_status`**, **`get_milestone_progress`**, etc.) stay accurate. Equivalent: **`uv run sv0-mcp sync --scope all`** from **sv0-mcp**, or the **sv0-graph** MCP **`sync_graph`** tool.
- **`task/*.Rmd` YAML** — in front matter, always put a **space after the colon** (e.g. **`updated: "…"`**, **`state: complete`**, **`roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full`**). Values jammed as **`updated:"…"`** or **`state:complete`** break strict parsers and **sv0-mcp** sync; **`./scripts/sv0 test`** runs **`scripts/verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** to catch that class of mistake.

## git push to GitHub (SSH port 22 blocked)

If **`git push`** fails with **`connect to host github.com port 22: Operation timed out`**, use **SSH over HTTPS (port 443)**. From the meta-repo root, prefix commands with **`./scripts/with-github-ssh443.sh`** (sets **`GIT_SSH_COMMAND`** per [GitHub’s guide](https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/troubleshooting-ssh/using-ssh-over-the-https-port)). Example: **`./scripts/with-github-ssh443.sh git push origin main`**. Push submodules first, then the meta-repo (see **sv0-mcp/README.md**).

/ai: when planning cross-cutting changes, list which submodules need commits and in what order (spec first vs code first).
